title: GATA6 immunohistochemistry and prognosis after surgical resection of pancreatic adenocarcinoma: results from the ESPAC-4 trial.
abstract: No prognostic biomarker is currently used in clinical management of patients with surgically resected pancreatic cancer other than CA-19-9. In this study, we tested the prognostic value of GATA6 measured with immunohistochemistry and digital assistance.
